fa-sausage.appearanceId: an elongated oval or cylindrical sausage link with rounded ends and a slight curved shape; plump tubular food shape with smooth skin outline
fa-sausage.functionalityId: represents a sausage food item in a menu or recipe context; labels a meat product in a grocery or cooking interface
fa-sausage.intentId: select or display a sausage in a food ordering or recipe application; indicate a meat ingredient or barbecue food item

fa-save.appearanceId: a classic 3.5-inch floppy disk silhouette with a rectangular body, a sliding metal shutter at the bottom, and a label area in the upper portion; square floppy disk outline with shutter and label panel
fa-save.functionalityId: saves the current document, file, or state to storage; triggers a save action in an application or editor
fa-save.intentId: preserve the current work or data to disk; commit changes permanently in a file or document editor

fa-save-circle-arrow-right.appearanceId: a floppy disk silhouette with a small filled circle containing a rightward-pointing arrow overlaid at one corner as a badge; square floppy disk outline with a circle-arrow-right badge
fa-save-circle-arrow-right.functionalityId: saves and forwards or exports a file to a next step or destination; triggers a save-and-continue or save-and-send action
fa-save-circle-arrow-right.intentId: save a file and move it forward in a workflow; export or forward saved content to the next step

fa-save-times.appearanceId: a floppy disk silhouette with a small X mark or times symbol overlaid at one corner as a badge; square floppy disk outline with a cancel or close badge
fa-save-times.functionalityId: cancels or dismisses a save action; represents an unsaved or save-failed state for a document
fa-save-times.intentId: cancel a pending save operation; indicate that a file was not saved or that saving was aborted

fa-sax-hot.appearanceId: a saxophone silhouette with a curved neck, flared bell, and key pad details, paired with small flame or heat lines indicating a hot playing style; saxophone body with heat or fire accent marks
fa-sax-hot.functionalityId: represents a hot jazz or energetic saxophone performance; indicates a live music, jazz, or high-energy saxophone context
fa-sax-hot.intentId: indicate a lively jazz or energetic musical performance on saxophone; represent hot jazz or a featured saxophone player

fa-saxophone.appearanceId: a saxophone silhouette with a curved neck, elongated tapered body with key pads, and a flared bell at the bottom; upright woodwind instrument outline with characteristic S-curve and bell
fa-saxophone.functionalityId: represents a saxophone instrument in a music application; selects a saxophone sound or opens saxophone-related content
fa-saxophone.intentId: play or select a saxophone instrument in a music interface; indicate a jazz or woodwind instrument category

fa-scale-unbalanced.appearanceId: a balance scale silhouette with two hanging pans at unequal heights on a horizontal beam, one side tipped lower than the other; tilted justice scale with asymmetric pan positions
fa-scale-unbalanced.functionalityId: represents an unequal or imbalanced comparison, judgment, or weight; indicates inequality, disproportion, or a biased evaluation
fa-scale-unbalanced.intentId: indicate an imbalance, inequality, or uneven comparison; represent a biased judgment or disproportionate weighting in a legal or analytical context

fa-scalpel.appearanceId: a surgical scalpel silhouette with a flat handle and a short pointed triangular blade at one end; medical cutting instrument outline with a slim handle and angled blade tip
fa-scalpel.functionalityId: represents a surgical scalpel or precision cutting tool; indicates a medical procedure, surgery, or fine incision action
fa-scalpel.intentId: indicate a surgical or medical cutting action; represent a precision medical tool in a healthcare or procedure interface

fa-scalpel-path.appearanceId: a surgical scalpel silhouette with a dotted or dashed curved path line extending from the blade tip indicating an incision trajectory; scalpel blade with a cut-path trace line
fa-scalpel-path.functionalityId: represents a surgical incision path or a planned cut trajectory; indicates a procedure route, surgical planning, or precision path cutting
fa-scalpel-path.intentId: plan or indicate a surgical incision path; represent a procedural cut route in a medical or surgical planning interface

fa-scanner.appearanceId: a flatbed document scanner body outline with a hinged lid, a long scan bed, and a control panel area at one side; horizontal scanner unit with a flat glass bed and lid
fa-scanner.functionalityId: represents a document or flatbed scanner device; initiates a scanning action or accesses scanner settings
fa-scanner.intentId: scan a document or image using a flatbed scanner; access scanning functionality in a device or document management interface

fa-scanner-image.appearanceId: a flatbed scanner body with a small photograph or image thumbnail displayed or overlaid on the scan bed area; horizontal scanner outline with an image badge on the glass bed
fa-scanner-image.functionalityId: represents scanning a photo or image document; initiates a photo scan or opens image scanning settings
fa-scanner-image.intentId: scan a photograph or image using a flatbed scanner; access photo scanning in a document or media management application

fa-scanner-keyboard.appearanceId: a flatbed scanner body with a small keyboard icon or key-row badge overlaid on or below the scanner unit; horizontal scanner outline with a keyboard indicator badge
fa-scanner-keyboard.functionalityId: represents a scanner with keyboard input or a keyboard-equipped scanning terminal; initiates keyboard-driven scanning or a keyed scan entry
fa-scanner-keyboard.intentId: operate a scanner using keyboard controls; access a keyboard-input scanning terminal in a document workflow

fa-scanner-touchscreen.appearanceId: a flatbed scanner body with a small touchscreen panel or finger-tap indicator badge overlaid at one end of the scanner unit; horizontal scanner outline with a touchscreen interface badge
fa-scanner-touchscreen.functionalityId: represents a touchscreen-enabled scanner or a scanner with a touch panel interface; activates scanning via a touch display
fa-scanner-touchscreen.intentId: use a touchscreen-equipped scanner for document scanning; access a touch-panel scanning interface in a device or office workflow

fa-scarecrow.appearanceId: a scarecrow silhouette with outstretched arms on a cross-shaped post, a straw-stuffed figure with a hat and patched clothing; cross-post scarecrow outline with hat and tattered clothes
fa-scarecrow.functionalityId: represents a scarecrow figure used in agricultural or Halloween contexts; indicates a farm, garden, or spooky seasonal theme
fa-scarecrow.intentId: indicate a farm, garden, or harvest theme; represent a scarecrow in an agricultural or autumn-seasonal context

fa-scarf.appearanceId: a long looping or draped scarf shape with tapered or fringed ends hanging in a curved arc; flowing fabric strip outline with rounded end tassels
fa-scarf.functionalityId: represents a scarf clothing accessory in a fashion or wardrobe interface; indicates cold-weather apparel or a style accessory
fa-scarf.intentId: select or display a scarf in a clothing or fashion application; indicate winter or cold-weather accessory options

fa-school.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a central rectangular facade, a bell tower or cupola on top, and symmetric wing extensions; institutional building outline with a tower and symmetric wings
fa-school.functionalityId: represents a school, educational institution, or learning facility; indicates an education category or school location
fa-school.intentId: navigate to or indicate a school building or educational facility; represent an educational institution in a map or directory interface

fa-school-circle-check.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a small filled circle containing a checkmark overlaid at one corner; institutional building outline with a circle-check approval badge
fa-school-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a school as verified, approved, or meeting a standard; confirms an educational institution's accredited or open status
fa-school-circle-check.intentId: indicate that a school is verified, accredited, or operationally approved; confirm a school status in an educational management interface

fa-school-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark overlaid at one corner; institutional building outline with a circle-alert warning badge
fa-school-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a school with an alert, warning, or issue requiring attention; indicates a school-related safety notice or status problem
fa-school-circle-exclamation.intentId: flag a school with a warning or alert status; indicate an issue or safety concern at an educational facility

fa-school-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a small filled circle containing an X mark overlaid at one corner; institutional building outline with a circle-X rejection or closure badge
fa-school-circle-xmark.functionalityId: represents a school that is closed, unavailable, or rejected; indicates that a school facility is not operational or has been removed
fa-school-circle-xmark.intentId: indicate a school closure, suspension, or removal; represent an unavailable or rejected educational institution in a management interface

fa-school-flag.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a flag on a short pole overlaid at the top or on the roof; institutional building outline with a flagpole and waving flag banner
fa-school-flag.functionalityId: represents a school with a national, institutional, or event flag displayed; indicates a flagged school location or a patriotic educational context
fa-school-flag.intentId: indicate a school with a flag display or national affiliation; represent a school with patriotic or institutional flag signage

fa-school-lock.appearanceId: a school building silhouette with a small padlock shape overlaid at one corner or on the entrance; institutional building outline with a lock badge overlay
fa-school-lock.functionalityId: represents a school in lockdown, a secured facility, or restricted access; indicates security measures or access restrictions at an educational institution
fa-school-lock.intentId: indicate a school lockdown or restricted access situation; represent secured or controlled entry to an educational facility

fa-screencast.appearanceId: a monitor or display screen outline with a small wireless broadcast or signal arc emanating from the screen; rectangular screen frame with outward-radiating cast or stream waves
fa-screencast.functionalityId: starts or manages a screen broadcast or casting session to a remote display; streams the screen content to another device wirelessly
fa-screencast.intentId: broadcast or cast a screen to a remote display or audience; share a live screen feed in a presentation or streaming interface

fa-screenshot.appearanceId: a monitor or screen outline with a dashed rectangular selection box or crop area inside the display area; screen frame with an inner dashed capture-region box
fa-screenshot.functionalityId: captures or triggers a screenshot of the current display content; defines a capture region for a screen grab
fa-screenshot.intentId: capture a screenshot or define a capture area on screen; grab or save the current display content as an image

fa-screwdriver.appearanceId: a screwdriver tool silhouette with a long cylindrical shaft, a flat or Phillips tip at one end, and a handle grip at the other; hand tool outline with a slim shaft and tip
fa-screwdriver.functionalityId: represents a screwdriver tool for assembly or repair; indicates a settings, configuration, or hardware maintenance action
fa-screwdriver.intentId: access settings or configuration tools; represent a repair or assembly action in a hardware or maintenance interface

fa-scribble.appearanceId: an irregular looping or zigzag freehand scribble line with multiple overlapping curved strokes; messy hand-drawn looping mark with no regular pattern
fa-scribble.functionalityId: represents a freehand drawing, annotation, or scribble action; indicates a markup, doodle, or handwritten note feature
fa-scribble.intentId: add a freehand annotation or doodle to a document; indicate a handwritten markup or creative scribble tool

fa-scroll.appearanceId: a rolled parchment scroll with two horizontal cylindrical rollers at the top and bottom and a smooth rectangular document face in the center; classic scroll silhouette with rounded end rollers
fa-scroll.functionalityId: represents a scroll document, ancient text, or a literary manuscript; indicates a historical, fantasy, or quest-log document context
fa-scroll.intentId: access a scroll-format document or ancient text; represent a historical manuscript or fantasy quest log in an application

fa-scroll-old.appearanceId: a rolled parchment scroll in a worn or aged style with tattered or irregular edges on the document face and visible aging details on the rolled ends; weathered scroll silhouette with frayed or worn edges
fa-scroll-old.functionalityId: represents an ancient, weathered, or antique scroll document; indicates an aged manuscript, old lore, or historical artifact context
fa-scroll-old.intentId: access an aged or historical scroll document; represent an antique manuscript or worn ancient text in a fantasy or historical application

fa-scrubber.appearanceId: a small filled circle or dot centered on a horizontal line, resembling a playback position indicator or timeline handle; round timeline thumb marker on a horizontal track
fa-scrubber.functionalityId: represents a media playback scrubber or timeline position handle; adjusts the current playback position along a media timeline
fa-scrubber.intentId: seek or adjust the playback position in a media player; indicate the current position on a video or audio timeline

fa-scythe.appearanceId: a scythe silhouette with a long curved blade attached to a long wooden handle at a swept angle; agricultural or grim-reaper tool outline with curved blade and tall staff
fa-scythe.functionalityId: represents a scythe harvesting tool or a grim-reaper death symbol; indicates a harvest, mowing, or dark fantasy context
fa-scythe.intentId: represent a harvest tool or a grim-reaper death symbol; indicate a farming, autumn harvest, or dark fantasy theme

fa-sd-card.appearanceId: a small rectangular SD memory card silhouette with a notched corner and contact stripe along one edge; flash memory card outline with a notched top-left corner and connector contacts
fa-sd-card.functionalityId: represents an SD or flash memory card for storage; indicates a memory card slot, file transfer, or removable storage action
fa-sd-card.intentId: access or manage files on an SD memory card; indicate removable flash storage in a device or file management interface

fa-sd-cards.appearanceId: two SD memory card silhouettes overlapping or stacked side-by-side, each with a notched corner and contact stripe; pair of flash memory card outlines arranged together
fa-sd-cards.functionalityId: represents multiple SD or flash memory cards or a dual-card slot; indicates expanded storage, a card collection, or multi-card management
fa-sd-cards.intentId: manage multiple SD cards or a dual-slot storage configuration; indicate expanded or redundant flash storage in a device interface

fa-seal.appearanceId: a circular wax seal or emblem shape with a decorative scalloped or sunburst edge and a smooth interior face; round seal disc outline with a ruffled or starburst perimeter
fa-seal.functionalityId: represents an official seal, stamp of approval, or emblem badge; indicates authentication, certification, or an official designation
fa-seal.intentId: indicate an official certification, authentication, or approval seal; represent an emblem or stamp of authority in a document or credential interface

fa-seal-exclamation.appearanceId: a circular wax seal shape with a scalloped or sunburst edge and an exclamation mark glyph centered inside the seal face; round seal disc with an interior exclamation point
fa-seal-exclamation.functionalityId: represents an official warning seal or an urgent certified alert; indicates a flagged or urgent official notice requiring attention
fa-seal-exclamation.intentId: indicate an official warning or urgent certified notice; represent an alarmed or flagged seal status in a document or compliance interface

fa-seal-question.appearanceId: a circular wax seal shape with a scalloped or sunburst edge and a question mark glyph centered inside the seal face; round seal disc with an interior question mark
fa-seal-question.functionalityId: represents a seal with an unknown or unverified status; indicates an official credential or badge that is pending verification or is in question
fa-seal-question.intentId: indicate an unverified or questionable official seal; represent a certification or credential whose authenticity is under review

fa-search.appearanceId: a magnifying glass silhouette with a circular lens frame and a diagonal handle extending from the lower right; round lens with a straight diagonal grip handle
fa-search.functionalityId: opens or triggers a search interface; initiates a query or lookup action in an application
fa-search.intentId: find or look up content within an application or data set; access a search feature to locate items or information

fa-search-dollar.appearanceId: a magnifying glass silhouette with a dollar sign or currency symbol visible inside the circular lens area; round search lens with a dollar glyph inside the glass
fa-search-dollar.functionalityId: searches for financial data, prices, or monetary values; looks up cost or currency information in a financial interface
fa-search-dollar.intentId: find financial records, prices, or monetary information; search for cost or currency data in a financial or e-commerce application

fa-search-location.appearanceId: a magnifying glass silhouette with a map location pin or teardrop marker visible inside the circular lens area; round search lens with a location pin glyph inside the glass
fa-search-location.functionalityId: searches for a geographic location, address, or place; performs a location lookup or map search action
fa-search-location.intentId: find a specific location, address, or place on a map; search for geographic information in a mapping or navigation interface

fa-search-minus.appearanceId: a magnifying glass silhouette with a horizontal minus bar inside the circular lens area; round search lens with a minus sign glyph inside the glass
fa-search-minus.functionalityId: zooms out or reduces the scale of a view; decreases the magnification level in a map or document
fa-search-minus.intentId: zoom out or reduce magnification in a view or document; decrease the scale level in a map or image viewer

fa-search-plus.appearanceId: a magnifying glass silhouette with a plus sign inside the circular lens area; round search lens with a cross or plus glyph inside the glass
fa-search-plus.functionalityId: zooms in or increases the scale of a view; enlarges the magnification level in a map or document
fa-search-plus.intentId: zoom in or increase magnification in a view or document; enlarge the scale level in a map or image viewer

fa-seat-airline.appearanceId: a side-profile silhouette of an airline seat with an upright backrest, armrest extensions, and a seat cushion base; airplane passenger seat outline viewed from the side
fa-seat-airline.functionalityId: represents an airline seat or passenger seating selection; indicates seat booking, cabin class, or in-flight seating in a travel interface
fa-seat-airline.intentId: select or view an airline seat in a flight booking or seat map interface; indicate passenger seating options in an aviation or travel application

fa-section.appearanceId: a typographic section sign glyph with two interlocking S-curves forming the double-S symbol; legal or document section symbol with two curved strokes
fa-section.functionalityId: inserts or references a section symbol in a legal, academic, or document context; marks or labels a numbered section of text
fa-section.intentId: insert or reference a section marker in a legal or academic document; indicate a numbered section in a formal text or contract

fa-semicolon.appearanceId: a typographic semicolon glyph with a dot above and a curved comma stroke below; standard punctuation mark with upper dot and lower descending curve
fa-semicolon.functionalityId: inserts a semicolon punctuation character in a text or code editor; separates clauses or code statements in a text field
fa-semicolon.intentId: insert a semicolon character in a text or code editing interface; separate sentence clauses or programming statements

fa-send.appearanceId: a paper airplane or triangular arrow shape pointing upward or to the upper right, resembling a send or submit directional glyph; triangular plane or forward-pointing arrow silhouette
fa-send.functionalityId: sends a message, email, or data to a recipient; submits or transmits content to a destination
fa-send.intentId: send a message or submit content to a recipient or destination; transmit data or a communication in a messaging or form interface

fa-send-back.appearanceId: a rectangular shape with a behind-layer arrow or a downward z-order arrow indicating the element is being moved one level behind another; layered rectangle with a send-behind directional arrow
fa-send-back.functionalityId: sends a selected element one layer backward in the stacking order; moves an object behind its immediate neighbor in a design layer stack
fa-send-back.intentId: move a design element one layer backward in a stacking order; manage object z-order in a graphic design or layout editor

fa-send-backward.appearanceId: a rectangular shape with an arrow indicating movement to the very back of a layer stack, or multiple behind-layer arrows suggesting full back-most repositioning; layered rectangle with a send-to-back directional arrow
fa-send-backward.functionalityId: sends a selected element all the way to the back of the stacking order; moves an object to the bottom-most layer position in a design layout
fa-send-backward.intentId: move a design element to the back of all layers in a stacking order; manage object z-order by pushing an element to the bottom layer in a design tool

fa-sensor.appearanceId: a small rectangular or circular sensor device silhouette with signal arcs or detection lines radiating outward; compact sensor unit outline with wireless signal or detection waves
fa-sensor.functionalityId: represents a sensor device for detecting environmental conditions or signals; monitors or reads data from a physical sensor
fa-sensor.intentId: monitor or manage a sensor device in an IoT or smart home interface; indicate environmental sensing or data collection from a physical sensor

fa-sensor-alert.appearanceId: a sensor device silhouette with a small exclamation mark or alert triangle badge overlaid; compact sensor unit outline with a warning or alert indicator badge
fa-sensor-alert.functionalityId: represents a sensor that has triggered an alert or detected an anomaly; indicates a sensor-detected warning event or threshold breach
fa-sensor-alert.intentId: respond to a sensor alert or anomaly detection; indicate that a sensor has triggered a warning in an IoT or monitoring interface

fa-sensor-cloud.appearanceId: a sensor device silhouette with a small cloud shape badge overlaid or combined; compact sensor unit outline with a cloud connectivity or upload indicator
fa-sensor-cloud.functionalityId: represents a cloud-connected sensor that uploads data to a remote service; indicates sensor data being sent to or stored in the cloud
fa-sensor-cloud.intentId: connect a sensor to cloud storage or a remote monitoring service; indicate cloud-based sensor data logging in an IoT or smart home platform
